positive: A stylized minimalist woodland scene featuring abstract silhouettes of birch trees, fox tails, and whimsical woodland animals (deer, rabbits) arranged in a circular, mandala-like pattern. The style should be sophisticated linework illustration with a slight retro, atomic graphic influence. Use limited, earthy color palette: deep forest green, burnt orange, and creamy ivory on a white background. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, ideal for a repeating pattern print on clothing. Clean, thick lines, high contrast, vector graphic quality, flat design elements, perfect composition, highly detailed, whimsical.
